entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Important food and oil crop in the semiarid tropics, contributing to household food consumption and cash income

entities.name: SEMIARID TROPICS
entities.description: Region where groundnut is an important food and oil crop

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: Region where groundnut yields are low due to production constraints

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: Region where groundnut yields are low due to production constraints

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The output of groundnut that genetics, genomics, and breeding aim to improve

entities.name: GENETICS
entities.description: Study of inheritance, genetic variability, heritability, combining ability, and trait correlations in groundnut

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: Study of the groundnut genome, including sequencing, marker development, and mapping

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: Process of developing improved groundnut varieties to increase productivity

entities.name: INHERITANCE
entities.description: Genetic process concerning the transmission of traits in groundnut

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: Diversity in the genetic makeup of groundnut used for breeding

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The extent to which traits in groundnut are passed from parents to offspring

entities.name: COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of groundnut parents to produce superior offspring

entities.name: TRAIT CORRELATIONS
entities.description: The relationship between different economically important traits in groundnut

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: Traditional breeding methods used to identify improved lines and sources of variability

entities.name: GENOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: Method used in groundnut genomics to determine the DNA sequence

entities.name: MARKER DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Method used in groundnut genomics to create genetic markers

entities.name: GENETIC MAPPING
entities.description: Method used in groundnut genomics to locate genes on the genome

entities.name: TRAIT MAPPING
entities.description: Method used in groundnut genomics to link specific traits to genomic regions

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: Functional units of heredity discovered through genomics for traits of interest

entities.name: VARIANTS
entities.description: Genetic variations discovered through genomics for traits of interest

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: Integration of genetic markers into the breeding process for selected traits

entities.name: GENOMIC TOOLS
entities.description: Tools from genomics integrated into the breeding process to increase efficiency

entities.name: YIELD TRIALING
entities.description: Process of testing groundnut varieties to increase precision in breeding

entities.name: PHENOTYPING
entities.description: Process of measuring observable traits to increase precision in breeding

entities.name: GENETIC GAIN
entities.description: The increase in genetic merit of groundnut varieties resulting from improved breeding efficiency
